title: Sofia's Happy Numbers
synopsis: Join Sofia as she discovers numbers 1 through 5 while exploring different emotions through colorful objects and experiences.

pages.text: One happy sun makes Sofia smile!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes stands under one large yellow sun with a cheerful face, her arms stretched wide with joy
illustration.alt: Sofia smiling under one happy sun

pages.text: Two bouncy balls make Sofia excited!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes jumping with excitement next to two colorful bouncing balls - one red, one blue
illustration.alt: Sofia with two bouncing balls looking excited

pages.text: Three soft hugs make Sofia feel loved!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes surrounded by three heart shapes representing hugs, looking content and peaceful
illustration.alt: Sofia surrounded by three heart-shaped hugs

pages.text: Four pretty flowers make Sofia curious!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes kneeling beside four colorful flowers - pink, yellow, purple, and orange - examining them closely
illustration.alt: Sofia looking at four colorful flowers with curiosity

pages.text: Five gentle stars make Sofia sleepy! Numbers and feelings go together perfectly.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes yawning peacefully under five twinkling stars in a soft nighttime scene
illustration.alt: Sofia looking sleepy under five gentle stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many suns made Sofia smile?
questions.explanation: One happy sun made Sofia smile!

questions.question: What made Sofia feel excited?
questions.explanation: Two bouncy balls made Sofia excited!

questions.question: How many stars made Sofia sleepy?
questions.explanation: Five gentle stars made Sofia sleepy!
